new_classes.label_de: Weinessig in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von mehr als 2 Litern (KN 2209 00 19)
new_classes.definition_en: Wine vinegar obtained by acetic fermentation of wine, presented in containers with a nominal volume of more than 2 litres, classified under CN code 2209 00 19.

coverage_explanation: The key distinguishing criteria for CN 2209 00 19 are: (1) the product is wine vinegar (obtained by acetic fermentation of wine — captured via the AceticFermentationProcess restriction and the WineVinegar parent class); and (2) it is presented in containers with a volume of more than 2 litres — captured via the LargeContainer (≥ 2 L) restriction using BFO has_part. The sibling code 2209 00 11 (small container, ≤ 2 L) is already modelled as WineVinegarSmallContainer22090011, providing implicit discrimination. A small gap remains: Additional Note 11 to Chapter 22 (referenced in the legal text) may contain additional compositional or quality criteria for wine vinegar that could further discriminate at a finer level, but this note's content is not provided in the source text and therefore cannot be axiomatised here. The existing TBox already contains the WineVinegar parent class and the AceticFermentationProcess and LargeContainer classes, all of which are reused.
